svg.title: AI JSON Prompter — full pipeline flow diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how a user prompt travels through server.py, main.py, intent/architecture/app_design stages, validation, repair, codegen, and finally generates a running app.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kind of prompts work best as input?')
sendPrompt('What does server.py do in this pipeline?')
g.text: Receives input, loads config, streams output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is pipeline_memory and what does it store?')
sendPrompt('How does intent extraction work in intents.py?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM structured call work?')
sendPrompt('How is the architecture prompt built?')

g.text: UI config · API schema · DB schema

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does app_design use intent and architecture?')
sendPrompt('What does the validation stage check for?')
sendPrompt('How does the repair engine fix issues?')
sendPrompt('Can the repair stage introduce new errors?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the re-validation step?')
sendPrompt('How do I run the generated app?')
